changes.detail: Persona scope amended from EXECUTIVE_DENSE to EXECUTIVE_BALANCED; activation/deactivation conditions updated for narrative emergence model

Added BALANCED_INTERPRETIVE_NARRATIVES (5 derive functions with emergence thresholds), BalancedNarrativeSection component, BalancedConsequenceField integration, ExecutiveInterpretation BALANCED branch, SupportRail emergence index, authority tier propagation
Added activeAuthorityTier state, handleAuthorityChange callback, passed onAuthorityChange to IntelligenceField, footer and details use dynamic activeAuthorityTier
Added CSS for balanced-narrative emergence surfaces, intelligence emergence index, left column interpretive markers
Updated 5B.2 to COMPLETE with commit hash, updated S6 stratum description
Execution narrative with preflight and phase summaries
Stream closure with Section 10 Architecture Memory Propagation
Reusable derive primitives, emergence policy, output contracts
